name: Proactive Intelligence
description: Learns user interaction patterns and proactively surfaces relevant context, suggestions, and anticipatory actions.

patternLearning.description: Enable automatic interaction pattern learning (default: true)

minInteractionsForPattern.description: Minimum interaction count before suggesting patterns (default: 5)

maxPatterns.description: Maximum number of patterns to track (default: 100)

insightDelivery.description: When to deliver proactive insights (default: on-demand)

contextEnrichment.description: Enrich agent context with predicted user needs (default: true)
